description: A photograph of numerous brick-shaped packages wrapped in tape, arranged in rows on a surface. A printed placard above shows two seals and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Del Rio, TX, with handwritten notations beside it.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Del Rio, TX
